name: Zaire 65" Floor Lamp - FLL4132 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the sleek and modern Zaire Floor Lamp. This elegant lighting solution features a strong metal body finished in a versatile black hue, providing a blend of durability and style that seamlessly integrates with any decor. Topped with a tasteful fabric shade, this lamp casts a warm, inviting glow for both ambient and task lighting.

The ZAIRE Floor Lamp stands an impressive 72 inches tall, ensuring a substantial and commanding presence in any room. The base measures 10 inches in diameter, offering stability without compromising floor space. With an 18-inch shade diameter, it disperses light evenly, making it ideal for reading areas, living rooms, or any corner that requires a touch of sophistication.

Easy to set up and built to accommodate a variety of light bulbs, the Zaire Floor Lamp is designed for convenience and versatility. The slender profile makes it a perfect choice for cozy spaces, while the black finish and classic design allow it to stand out in more spacious interiors. Whether you're aiming for a minimalist aesthetic or adding to a more eclectic mix of decor, this floor lamp is sure to elevate the ambiance of your environment.
